empty_path_convention.source_equals_target: the zero-edge path has the all-zero profile

bits.name: m_proof
bits.zero_condition: a theorem proof is supplied without axiom, opaque, sorry, or admit

bits.name: m_witness
bits.zero_condition: an explicit executable construction witness is supplied

bits.name: m_invariant
bits.zero_condition: the bounded domain, composition law, and boundary invariant are preserved

bits.name: m_verifier
bits.zero_condition: the targeted build, verifier, and test pass

bits.name: m_evidence
bits.zero_condition: every required external input is pinned, reproducible, and correctly typed

bits.name: m_guard
bits.zero_condition: the anti-unconditional rule rejects every stronger unsupported claim

objectives.Omega_B: min over pi in SimplePaths_B(S,T) of max over e in pi of Delta_B(e)
objectives.P_B: pad to |V|-1 coordinates the descending sort of (Delta_B(e) : e in pi)
objectives.Phi_B: lexicographic minimum of P_B(pi) over pi in SimplePaths_B(S,T)
objectives.pi_B_phi: the deterministically tie-broken path attaining Phi_B(S,T)
objectives.e_B_phi: the deterministically tie-broken maximum-cost edge on pi_B_phi

deterministic_tie_break.path_rule: lexicographic order on the sequence of stable edge identifiers
deterministic_tie_break.edge_rule: lexicographic order on stable edge identifiers among equal-cost edges

next_step_rule.operation: change exactly the highest nonzero bit of Delta_B(e_B_phi) from 1 to 0
next_step_rule.frame_condition: all other edge costs remain unchanged and no higher bit is introduced
next_step_rule.acceptance: retain the modification iff Phi'_B(S,T) is lexicographically smaller than Phi_B(S,T)

monotonicity_lemma.name: VasquezSortedProfileSingleDecrease
monotonicity_lemma.statement: If one entry x of a finite cost profile is replaced by y with 0 <= y < x and every other entry is unchanged, then the descending-sorted padded profile strictly decreases lexicographically.
argument: All multiplicities above x are unchanged.
The multiplicity of x decreases by one.
At the first profile coordinate affected by that lost occurrence of x, the new value is strictly below x.
Therefore the new descending-sorted padded profile is lexicographically smaller.

boundary.no_overclaim_guard: global importance and global novelty are not established

blocked_promotions: repository dependency graph -> universal mathematical dependency graph
Vasquez bounded-closure equation -> most important formula ever known
Vasquez bounded-closure equation -> global novelty established
